name: Mitani Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Mitani Sangyo Co., Ltd. engages in chemicals, information systems, air conditioning systems, energy, resin, electronics, and housing equipment businesses in Japan and internationally. The company offers inorganic chemicals comprising soda chemicals, ammonia and acid products, wastewater treatment chemicals, and others; organic chemicals, including alcohols, aromatic hydrocarbons, ester, ketones, etc.; pharmaceutical intermediates and active pharmaceutical ingredients; functional materials, such as health food materials, electronic materials, food additives, catalysts, etc.; pesticide intermediates, fine chemicals, chemical products, etc.; and reuse and recycle of waste, by-products, etc. It also provides system integration services; package software; hardware maintenance; and data center services, as well as constructs information infrastructures. In addition, the company is involved in the construction of air conditioning, sanitary plumbing, and special facilities construction, as well as other special technical construction; and renovation activities. Further, it offers petroleum products, such as heavy oil, diesel, gasoline, and reclaimed oil, etc.; LPG gas, fuel cells, and solar power generator systems. Additionally, the company provides plastic moldings, which include automotive parts, precision parts, special moldings; assembled substrates, electronic parts, dies, and composite unit products; and kitchen and bathroom products, house furniture, and air conditioning equipment. It also offers research and analysis services for the computer industry; maintenance and management services for condominiums and buildings; and temporary staffing, card printing, and travel agency services; and concrete, pottery and porcelain products, and electronic ceramics, as well as sells mobile communication equipment and supplies. Mitani Sangyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1928 and is based in Kanazawa, Japan.
